title: tanacetum densum subsp. sivasicum
intro: Tanacetum densum subsp. sivasicum, also known as Sivas tansy or Turkish tansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its compact growth and small, white or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Tanacetum densum subsp. sivasicum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a dried herb in various formulations, including capsules and tablets.
